ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team name */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team name */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Home team score */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Away team score */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the game was played in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game this play belongs to */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the game (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "time_remaining_period" TEXT /* Time remaining in the period (e.g., 9:52, 8:15) */,
  "secs_remaining" INTEGER /* Seconds remaining in the period */,
  "secs_remaining_absolute" INTEGER /* Seconds remaining in the absolute game time */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the play */,
  "score_diff" INTEGER /* Score difference between teams after this play */,
  "play_length" INTEGER /* Length of the play in seconds */,
  "win_prob" REAL /* Win probability after this play */,
  "shot_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the shot (in feet) */,
  "shot_type" TEXT /* Type of shot (e.g., Jumper, Layup, Free Throw) */,
  "shot_location" TEXT /* Location of the shot (e.g., Paint, Mid-Range, Three-Point) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Point Guard, Power Forward) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (in inches) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play this score belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that scored */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who scored */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., Jumper, Layup, Free Throw) */,
  "score_value" INTEGER /* Value of the score (e.g., 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "possessions" (
  "possession_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each possession */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play this possession belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that possessed the ball */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who possessed the ball */,
  "possession_length" INTEGER /* Length of the possession (in seconds) */,
  "possession_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the possession (e.g., Score, Turnover, Rebound) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("possession_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_possessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_possessions_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_possessions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shots" (
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play this shot belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that shot */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who shot */,
  "shot_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the shot (in feet) */,
  "shot_type" TEXT /* Type of shot (e.g., Jumper, Layup, Free Throw) */,
  "shot_location" TEXT /* Location of the shot (e.g., Paint, Mid-Range, Three-Point) */,
  "shot_made" INTEGER /* Whether the shot was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnovers" (
  "turnover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnover */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play this turnover belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that committed the turnover */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who committed the turnover */,
  "turnover_type" TEXT /* Type of turnover (e.g., Steal, Block, Traveling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnovers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnovers_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnovers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Fan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_game_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has access */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the user has access to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., View, Edit, Delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_game_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_game_access_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
